steps.title: Find the last nonempty bin
steps.content: The histogram bins have width $50$. The rightmost nonempty bin covers lengths at least $200$ feet but less than $250$ feet.

steps.title: Choose a possible maximum
steps.content:
A maximum value must come from the rightmost nonempty bin. Among the choices, only $218$ is in the interval:
$$200\le h<250$$
The answer is D.
